mechanics.excerpt: CHARACTER CREATION BRASH TANKER Greenvale_ the sleepy little village of your birth, was razed by the Thirty-seventh Striker Cluster of Clan Wolf" Delta Galaxy when tney invaded the world of Memmingen in late 3051. Though you hooked up with the fleeing Third Drakons_ the fighting left you an orphan at the age of eight.
